svg.text: Temperature response is delayed by about 60s, so it is kept as future work rather than a current model node.
Note: current model excludes temperature node.
Training loss: weighted pinball quantile loss for q = 0.10, 0.50, 0.90 in standardized response space.
Interval error: violation = max(P10 - y, 0) + max(y - P90, 0); error = weighted violation^2.
Training thresholds: total and per-target thresholds are validation interval-error percentiles.
Online alert: total_error > threshold OR target_error > target_threshold, for consecutive high-error windows.
Default online consecutive = 2; --no-latch disables holding anomaly=1 after the streak clears.
